Value: This parent group contains groups for terms in any of the following classes: CHEM, DRUG/TOX, CHAL, SERO, and ALLERGY. Each group contains terms with the same Component, Property, and Time aspect. The terms in a given group also have the same System, except when the System is in the intravascular or urine category, in which case terms that have any of the Systems in that category are rolled up. For example, a group for a given analyte in CSF only has terms with the System 'CSF', but a group for an analyte in an intravascular specimen contains terms with a variety of Systems, including 'Bld', 'Ser/Plas', 'BldV', etc. Some intravascular Systems are purposely excluded from this rollup, including cord blood ('BldCo') and dried blood spots (DBS).
